title: phlegmariurus haeckelii
intro: Phlegmariurus haeckelii, also known as the Haeckel's climbing fern, is a type of small, climbing fern native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus haeckelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. Phlegmariurus haeckelii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
